{
  "rules": [
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.type_test_certification_body",
      "operator": "in",
      "value": ["ASTA", "KEMA"],
      "unit": null,
      "condition": "demonstrating compliance with IEC 62271-200",
      "quote": "Manufacturer shall provide ASTA or KEMA type test certificates for the switchgear assemblies demonstrating compliance with IEC 62271-200."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.type_test_covers_rated_voltage",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": true,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Type test reports shall cover rated voltage, short circuit withstand, temperature rise, internal arc, and dielectric tests."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.type_test_covers_short_circuit_withstand",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": true,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Type test reports shall cover rated voltage, short circuit withstand, temperature rise, internal arc, and dielectric tests."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.type_test_covers_temperature_rise",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": true,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Type test reports shall cover rated voltage, short circuit withstand, temperature rise, internal arc, and dielectric tests."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.type_test_covers_internal_arc",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": true,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Type test reports shall cover rated voltage, short circuit withstand, temperature rise, internal arc, and dielectric tests."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.type_test_covers_dielectric",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": true,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Type test reports shall cover rated voltage, short circuit withstand, temperature rise, internal arc, and dielectric tests."
    }
  ]
}
